title: Cannot invite second billing admin
summary: The account owner can invite one billing admin, but the second invite returns a 409 conflict even when the email is new.
notes: Customer reproduced this twice from the production workspace.

title: Ticket CSV export drops resolved rows
summary: CSV export from the queue excludes resolved tickets when the user selects the all-status filter.
notes: Support asked whether this is a frontend filter issue or API behavior.

title: Search ignores customer email
summary: Typing a customer email into search does not return matching tickets, although title and summary matching work.

title: Mobile reply drawer clips long names
summary: On narrow screens the requester name overlaps the reply button in the ticket detail drawer.
notes: Fixed in a patch branch; waiting for visual verification.
